nasb.text: He measured the court, a perfect square, a hundred cubits long and a hundred cubits wide; and the altar was in front of the temple.

esv.text: And he measured the court, a hundred cubits long and a hundred cubits broad, a square. And the altar was in front of the temple.

cnv.text: 他又量了內院，長五十公尺，寬五十公尺，是正方形的；祭壇就在殿的前面。

ccb.text: 他量了殿前的院子，是五十米宽的正方形，祭坛在殿的前面。
